shorts.headline: U.S. AND IRAN AGREE TO 2-WEEK CEASEFIRE
shorts.narration: Breaking news! The U.S. and Iran have agreed to a two-week ceasefire, just hours before Trump’s deadline to launch massive strikes. This sudden diplomatic move has sent shockwaves through global markets and geopolitics. Will this pause lead to lasting peace or just a temporary reprieve? Stay tuned for updates.

shorts.headline: Stock Market Today: Oil Jumps, Dow Dips
shorts.narration: Oil prices are soaring as tensions with Iran ease, but the Dow is dipping. The U.S. raising the temperature on Iran has traders on edge. With markets reacting to every twist in this geopolitical drama, what’s next for your portfolio? Keep an eye on oil and stocks today.

shorts.headline: Republican Clay Fuller Wins Special Election
shorts.narration: Clay Fuller has won the special election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene, but his narrow victory is giving Democrats reason to celebrate. This unexpected outcome could signal a shift in voter sentiment. What does this mean for the GOP’s future? Follow for more political updates.

shorts.headline: Telehealth Abortion Remains Available After Judge’s Ruling
shorts.narration: A federal judge has ruled that telehealth abortion will remain available for now. The FDA must review the safety of mifepristone, while Louisiana’s case to ban telemedicine abortions will proceed after the review. This decision keeps the debate over reproductive rights front and center. Stay updated on this evolving story.

shorts.headline: Aubrey Plaza Expecting First Child with Christopher Abbott
shorts.narration: Parks and Rec star Aubrey Plaza is expecting her first child with actor Christopher Abbott! The couple, who met on the set of Black Bear, are thrilled to welcome their baby. Fans are celebrating the news of this talented duo’s growing family. Congrats to the happy couple!

shorts.headline: Wife of US Soldier Released from Immigration Detention
shorts.narration: Annie Ramos, the wife of a U.S. Army staff sergeant, has been released from federal immigration detention after nearly a week. Her detention inside a Louisiana military base sparked outrage and concern. This case highlights the ongoing challenges faced by military families. Follow for more on this story.

shorts.headline: DOH, CDC Investigating Rise in Strep Cases in West Hawaii
shorts.narration: The Hawaii Department of Health is investigating a spike in strep infections in West Hawaii. With cases rising over the past few months, health officials are working to identify the cause and prevent further spread. Stay informed about this public health concern and take necessary precautions.

shorts.headline: South Korea Stocks Lead Gains as Oil Prices Plunge
shorts.narration: South Korea stocks are leading gains in Asia as oil prices plunge following the U.S.-Iran ceasefire deal. President Trump’s decision to suspend planned attacks has boosted investor confidence. With markets reacting positively, could this be the start of a broader recovery? Follow for daily global updates.

shorts.headline: 4 '80s Inspired Retro Gadgets You Can Find on Amazon
shorts.narration: Step back in time with these 4 retro-inspired gadgets on Amazon! From typewriter-style keyboards to CD players styled as record players, these '80s throwbacks are perfect for nostalgia lovers. Whether you’re a tech geek or a vintage enthusiast, these gadgets are a must-see. Check them out now!
